response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains, with solid full-stack and systems work. However, the resume shows no experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or growth/measurement systems experience — the core of this Principal IC6 role. Current title is Staff/Senior level, not Principal, and there is no evidence of multi-team platform leadership at enterprise scale.
strengths: 15+ years across web, backend, embedded, and distributed systems with high-throughput experience at Sociomantic
Polyglot proficiency including TypeScript, Node.js, C/C++, Java, and DLang aligned with required languages
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching and mentoring
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or growth measurement platform experience
No demonstrated Principal/IC6-level scope — no evidence of architecting cross-team platforms used by multiple orgs
Limited data science, statistical analysis, or telemetry infrastructure background required for the role

key_factors.factor: No evidence of Principal-level cross-team systemic impact
